= Test fixtures from the DocBook xslTNG Stylesheets project

The files in this directory are taken from the DocBook xslTNG Stylesheets
project, available at: https://github.com/docbook/xslTNG

The files included are:

* DocBook xslTNG Stylesheets Guide. It is a multi-file document, with the root
at `guide/guide.xml`.

* DocBook xslTNG Stylesheets test suite, a set of DocBook XML files that are
used to test the stylesheets. The XML files we use are `test/*.xml`.
